query: SELECT id, title, shortDescription, coverImageUrl, image1, image2 FROM experiences WHERE title LIKE '%Blob%' OR title LIKE '%Paseo%' OR title LIKE '%Hinchable%' OR title LIKE '%Pass Day%' OR title LIKE '%Cableski%' OR title LIKE '%Escolar%' OR title LIKE '%Team%' ORDER BY title LIMIT 20;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2rp6zCMfN7Vv5FK.root --database AV298FS8t5SaTurBBRqhgQ --execute SELECT id, title, shortDescription, coverImageUrl, image1, image2 FROM experiences WHERE title LIKE '%Blob%' OR title LIKE '%Paseo%' OR title LIKE '%Hinchable%' OR title LIKE '%Pass Day%' OR title LIKE '%Cableski%' OR title LIKE '%Escolar%' OR title LIKE '%Team%' ORDER BY title LIMIT 20;

rows.title: Aventura Hinchable Acuática
rows.shortDescription: Parque acuático hinchable flotante con toboganes y trampolines.

rows.title: Blob Jump
rows.shortDescription: Lanzamiento acrobático sobre colchón hinchable. Adrenalina pura en el lago.

rows.title: Cableski & Wakeboard Dia Completo
rows.shortDescription: Wakeboard y esquí acuático con sistema de cable. Material y monitor incluidos.

rows.title: Paseos en Barco
rows.shortDescription: Paseo exclusivo por el embalse. Ideal para grupos y celebraciones.
